subcodes.first_line: O ancient friend! Thy letter was received. Praise be to God that the upheaval in Tihrán hath been favourably concluded, and the transgressing hand of the people [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار قدیم نامه رسید الحمد لله عمل انقلاب طهران بخیر انجامید و دست تطاول اهل
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @personal instructions, @study; deepening
